project_title: AI 與校園生活 60 秒短影片

visual_plan.visual_description: 標題文字 'AI × 校園生活' 動態浮現，背景為模糊的校園景色
visual_plan.ai_image_prompt: A futuristic university campus with holographic AI interface overlay, bright daylight, cinematic, 16:9
visual_plan.notes: 使用 AI 生成圖片作為背景，文字後製加上

visual_plan.visual_description: 學生坐在圖書館，筆電螢幕顯示 AI 輔助介面，畫面分割顯示學習前後對比
visual_plan.ai_image_prompt: A student studying in a modern library with AI assistant on laptop screen, warm lighting, photorealistic, 16:9
visual_plan.notes: 主要畫面 + AI 輔助效果可後製加上

visual_plan.visual_description: 學生手持平板，螢幕顯示 AI 繪圖從草稿到完成的過程
visual_plan.ai_image_prompt: A student using AI art generation tool on tablet, colorful digital artwork appearing on screen, creative workspace, 16:9
visual_plan.notes: 強調 AI 生成的驚喜感

visual_plan.visual_description: 在校園中，手機畫面顯示 AI 推薦課程與活動日曆
visual_plan.ai_image_prompt: A student using smartphone with AI app on university campus, modern buildings in background, daytime, 16:9

visual_plan.visual_description: 學生們圍坐討論，中間放置筆電但畫面聚焦在人的互動
visual_plan.ai_image_prompt: A group of university students discussing and collaborating in a study room, warm atmosphere, natural lighting, 16:9
visual_plan.notes: 強調人的溫度，AI 只是背景元素

visual_plan.visual_description: 校園日落，學生背影走向遠方，天空有輕微的 AI 全息投影效果
visual_plan.ai_image_prompt: A university campus at sunset with a student walking towards the horizon, subtle AI holographic elements in the sky, cinematic, 16:9
visual_plan.notes: 日落場景，AI 元素不過度張揚

visual_plan.visual_description: 結尾標題畫面，簡潔漸層背景，文字居中
visual_plan.ai_image_prompt: Clean title card with text in modern Chinese typography, gradient background from blue to purple, minimalist design, 16:9
visual_plan.notes: 純色背景 + 文字，不需複雜 AI 生成
